antithesis_summary: Use full-window attention throughout because long-range coverage may matter more than local efficiency on 2048-token sequences.
label: Locality vs global context
thesis_summary: Preserve the mostly local `SSSL` pattern because it keeps throughput high while retaining periodic full-context refresh.
why_active: The incumbent's `SSSL` pattern is still an untested compromise between cheaper local attention and full 2048-token coverage.
